settings.title: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.expanded_content: We accept a variety of payment methods including credit/debit cards, PayPal, and other digital wallets for your convenience.

settings.title: How can I track my order?
settings.expanded_content: Once your order is shipped, we'll send you a tracking number via email.

settings.title: What is your return policy?
settings.expanded_content: We offer a 30-day return policy for unused and unopened products. Please visit our Returns & Exchanges page for more details.

settings.title: Do you ship internationally?
settings.expanded_content: Yes, we do ship internationally. Shipping costs and delivery times vary depending on the destination.

settings.title: How can I cancel or modify my order?
settings.expanded_content: You can cancel or modify your order within 24 hours of placing it. Please contact our customer service team for assistance.

settings.title: Do you offer any discounts or loyalty rewards?
settings.expanded_content: Yes, we offer periodic discounts and have a loyalty program for returning customers. Sign up for our newsletter to stay updated on special offers.

settings.title: Do you offer gift cards?
settings.expanded_content: Yes, we offer gift cards in various denominations. You can purchase them directly from our website.

settings.title: What should I do if I receive a damaged item?
settings.expanded_content: If you receive a damaged item, please contact our customer service immediately to arrange for a replacement or refund.
